def compute_factor(df: pl.DataFrame) -> pl.Series:
    # Sort by code and date for per-code time-series operators
    df = df.sort(['code', 'date'])

    # Delayed close prices
    delay_20 = delay(pl.col('close'), periods=20)
    delay_10 = delay(pl.col('close'), periods=10)
    delay_1 = delay(pl.col('close'), periods=1)

    # Condition: (delay(close,20) - delay(close,10))/10 - (delay(close,10) - close)/10 < -0.1
    cond = ((delay_20 - delay_10) / 10 - (delay_10 - pl.col('close')) / 10) < (-0.1)

    # False branch: -1 * (close - delay(close, 1))
    false_branch = -1 * (pl.col('close') - delay_1)

    # Apply conditional
    factor = pl.when(cond).then(1).otherwise(false_branch)

    return df.select(factor).to_series()
